mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend (user_id, friend_id, status, action_user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{status}, #{actionUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friend WHERE (user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (user_id = #{friendId} AND friend_id = #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, u.username as friend_username, u.avatar as friend_avatar, u.email as friend_email, u.signature as friend_signature FROM friend f JOIN user u ON (f.friend_id = u.id AND f.user_id = #{userId}) OR (f.user_id = u.id AND f.friend_id = #{userId}) WHERE (f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.friend_id = #{friendId}) OR (f.user_id = #{friendId} AND f.friend_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1

SELECT f.id, f.status, f.action_user_id, f.created_at, f.updated_at, f.is_top, #{userId} as user_id, IF(f.user_id = #{userId}, f.friend_id, f.user_id) as friend_id, u.username as friend_username, u.avatar as friend_avatar, u.email as friend_email, u.role as friend_role, u.signature as friend_signature, u.created_at as friend_created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message m WHERE m.sender_id = IF(f.user_id = #{userId}, f.friend_id, f.user_id) AND m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 0) as unreadCount, (SELECT m.created_at FROM chat_message m WHERE (m.sender_id = f.user_id AND m.receiver_id = f.friend_id) OR (m.sender_id = f.friend_id AND m.receiver_id = f.user_id) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1) as lastMessageTime FROM friend f JOIN user u ON (f.user_id = #{userId} AND u.id = f.friend_id) OR (f.friend_id = #{userId} AND u.id = f.user_id) WHERE (f.user_id = #{userId} OR f.friend_id = #{userId}) AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.is_top DESC, lastMessageTime DESC

SELECT f.id, f.status, f.action_user_id, f.created_at, f.updated_at, #{userId} as user_id, f.user_id as friend_id, u.username as friend_username, u.avatar as friend_avatar, u.email as friend_email, u.signature as friend_signature FROM friend f JOIN user u ON u.id = f.action_user_id WHERE f.friend_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 0

SELECT f.id, f.status, f.action_user_id, f.created_at, f.updated_at, #{userId} as user_id, IF(f.user_id = #{userId}, f.friend_id, f.user_id) as friend_id, u.username as friend_username, u.avatar as friend_avatar, u.email as friend_email, u.signature as friend_signature FROM friend f JOIN user u ON u.id = f.action_user_id WHERE (f.user_id = #{userId} OR f.friend_id = #{userId}) AND f.status = 2 AND f.action_user_id != #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friend WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR friend_id = #{userId}) AND status = 1
